schema:description: This photograph shows Martin Yan performing a wok frying cooking demonstration for attendees of the UC Davis Confucius Institute grand opening. The Institute, launched in 2013 through a partnership between UC Davis and Jiangnan University near Shanghai, advanced global leadership in food and beverage science and technology. It offered cultural programs, academic collaborations, and culinary events until its closure in August 2020.
schema:name: Martin Yan wok stir frying demonstration UC Davis Confucius Institute guests
schema:sdPublisher: UC Davis Library, Archives and Special Collections
